title: Veld Config
description: Configuration file for the Veld code generation framework

input.description: Path to the main .veld entry file (e.g. "app.veld")

backendOut.description: Output directory for backend generated code. Overrides 'out' for backend emitter. Use when backend and frontend are separate projects (e.g. "../backend/src/generated")

frontendOut.description: Output directory for frontend generated code. Overrides 'out' for frontend emitter. Use when backend and frontend are separate projects (e.g. "../frontend/src/generated")

backendDir.description: Path to backend project directory — used by setup to patch tsconfig, go.mod, etc.

frontendDir.description: Path to frontend project directory — used by setup to patch tsconfig, pubspec, etc.

baseUrl.description: Base URL baked into the frontend SDK (e.g. "/api/v1"). If empty, uses environment variable at runtime.

validate.description: Generate zero-dependency runtime validators and wire into route handlers

postGenerate.description: Shell command to run after code generation completes (e.g. "npm run format")
